microsoft_ft: Owned end-to-end **product taxonomy** and classification governance for Azure's resilience validation program, standardizing data hierarchies and attribution across 45+ annual drills to ensure consistent organization and retrieval.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and **self-service scheduling workflows** that reduced operational toil by 30% and scaled execution across enterprise customers.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous validation framework.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract with full governance documentation.

Built an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows to improve information architecture across drill data, reducing planning cycle time by **39%** and increasing drill capacity by 21% through structured metadata standards.
microsoft_2023: Championed **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key teams and saved 37 engineering hours monthly.

Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ user research interviews** with Azure service teams to identify critical feature gaps and inform taxonomy and classification priorities.

Improved **data integrity and retrieval** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting lookup time by 83% and improving content governance across teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, coordinating data governance and classification across 140+ teams.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to surface 81 hours of manual effort per region launch, then built a **product roadmap** to automate critical paths — directly mirroring taxonomy migration and workflow governance practices.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil and surface data quality issues across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to prioritize automation gaps with accurate, consistently attributed product data.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **legacy OS migration strategy** and mapped dependencies across 1,200+ stations, achieving zero operational downtime during a 2,000+ unit pilot by maintaining rigorous data governance and classification documentation.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **governing the product backlog** to resolve 40+ high-priority tickets and enforce consistent data standards across the developer intake process.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating software deployment by 25% through structured requirements creation and cross-functional governance coordination.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by implementing a new CRM data governance process, standardizing product and customer attribution across 200+ monthly proposals to improve retrieval accuracy and reduce classification errors.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing information architecture across the website and Google profile for improved user navigation.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial data analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks through consistent data classification and establishing governance rules for future profitability tracking.
